title: campanula trachelium var. oligosantha
intro: Campanula trachelium var. oligosantha, also known as the small-flowered lady's mantle or bluebells of Scotland, is a type of flowering plant in the bellflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and inflammation due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Campanula trachelium var. oligosantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
